description: Transcript ID (GENCODE ENST or PacBio PB format)
Human-readable transcript name (GENCODE name or PB ID)
Annotation source: GENCODE or SQANTI
Chromosome
Genomic strand (+ or -)
Transcription start site (strand-aware genomic coordinate)
Transcription end site (strand-aware genomic coordinate)
Total transcript length in nucleotides (genomic span)
Number of exons
Semicolon-delimited exon coordinates with CDS/UTR annotations (format: start_end_strand:type)
Semicolon-delimited splice junction coordinates (format: donor_acceptor_strand)
Genomic start of CDS region (always smaller coordinate)
Genomic end of CDS region (always larger coordinate)
CDS length in nucleotides
CDS length in amino acids (floor of cds_length_nt / 3)
CDS divisible by 3: 1 = yes (in-frame), 0 = no (out-of-frame), NA = no CDS
5-prime UTR length in nucleotides (strand-aware)
3-prime UTR length in nucleotides (strand-aware)
Whether isoform is protein-coding (from biotype or CDS presence)
How coding status was determined: GENCODE_biotype, GENCODE_CDS, or SQANTI
Mean TMM-normalized CPM in DMSO samples for cell type (ddali, dd, doali, at2, fb, mv)
Sum of raw read counts in DMSO samples for cell type
Mean TMM-normalized CPM in Smg1i samples for cell type
Sum of raw read counts in Smg1i samples for cell type
Sum of raw read counts across all samples and conditions
Translated CDS protein is a perfect match or perfect subset of UniProt canonical protein sequence (requires --protein flag; NA if not protein-coding or translation failed)
Percentage of 20-aa sliding windows in the translated protein that are found verbatim in the UniProt canonical sequence (requires --protein flag; NA if not protein-coding or translation failed)
UniProt amino acid range of the longest contiguous stretch of identical sequence between the translated isoform protein and the UniProt canonical (format: start-end; requires --protein flag)
